# themes/solarized.py - Solarized Theme

Solarized color scheme.

---

## Theme: `solarized`

The Solarized color scheme - precision colors for machines and people.

### Color Palette

| Name | Hex | Usage |
|------|-----|-------|
| `base03` | `#002B36` | Dark background |
| `base02` | `#073642` | Dark background highlight |
| `base01` | `#586E75` | Optional emphasized content |
| `base00` | `#657B83` | Optional emphasized content |
| `base0` | `#839496` | Body text |
| `base1` | `#93A1A1` | Body text emphasized |
| `base2` | `#EEE8D5` | Light background |
| `base3` | `#FDF6E3` | Light background highlight |
| `yellow` | `#B58900` | Accent |
| `orange` | `#CB4B16` | Accent |
| `red` | `#DC322F` | Accent |
| `magenta` | `#D33682` | Accent |
| `violet` | `#6C71C4` | Accent |
| `blue` | `#268BD2` | Accent |
| `cyan` | `#2AA198` | Accent |
| `green` | `#859900` | Accent |

### Usage

```python
app = App(theme="solarized")
```
